name: fatcatmaofei--openclaw-guardian
description: A security layer plugin for OpenClaw that intercepts dangerous tool calls (exec, write, edit) through two-tier regex blacklist rules and LLM-based intent verification. Critical operations require 3/3 unanimous LLM votes, warning-level operations require 1 LLM confirmation. 99% of normal operations pass instantly with zero overhead. Includes bypass/pipe-attack detection, path canonicalization, SHA-256 hash-chain audit logging, and auto-discovers a cheap model from your existing provider config.
